title: ATI Tour Card
description: Tour card section style with border, hover shadow, and parent-triggered cover zoom

styles.css: &{overflow: hidden; transition: box-shadow 200ms ease;} &:hover{box-shadow: var(--wp--preset--shadow--300);} & .wp-block-post-title a:hover{text-decoration: none;} & .lsx-info-value a{transition: color 200ms ease; text-decoration: none;} & .lsx-info-value a:hover{color: var(--wp--preset--color--primary-500); text-decoration: none;} & .wp-block-post-terms.is-style-term-button a{transition: color 200ms ease, background-color 200ms ease;} & .wp-block-post-terms.is-style-term-button a:hover{color: var(--wp--preset--color--primary-500); background-color: var(--wp--preset--color--neutral-100); text-decoration: none;} & .wp-block-post-terms.ati-tour-card-badges{display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; column-gap: 0.5rem; row-gap: 0.5rem;} & .wp-block-post-terms.ati-tour-card-badges .wp-block-post-terms__separator{display: none;} & .wp-block-post-terms.ati-tour-card-badges a:nth-of-type(n+4){display: none;} & .wp-block-cover__image-background{transition: transform 300ms ease;} &:hover .wp-block-cover__image-background{transform: scale(1.05);}
